name: Spring Scale In
description: Words pop in with a spring overshoot — scale runs 0.4 → 1.06 → 1.0. Physical and slightly playful; the overshoot reads as bouncy without crossing into cartoonish.
notes: The spring easing's overshoot (1.56) lands at ~6% past the target before settling. Pair with playful brands or product launches — avoid for clinical / enterprise contexts.
